# Productlane: HubSpot Integration (Official Docs)

## Summary
Official documentation for Productlane's HubSpot integration, described as "one of our most requested integrations." Works similarly to the Intercom integration. The core value: a widget in HubSpot appears for every company and person, allowing CSMs to push feedback to Productlane and see delivery status directly in HubSpot. Also syncs HubSpot contact properties as segments in Productlane.

## Key quotations / statistics
- **Integration overview:** "Create a Productlane widget within Hubspot to quickly push conversations and see the delivery status. Additionally, sync all properties from Hubspot contacts to Productlane as segments."
- **Widget in HubSpot:** Appears in HubSpot for every company and person. CSM can push feedback and see delivery status directly in HubSpot sidebar.
- **Segment sync:** "Automatically converting HubSpot properties to segments in Productlane. Simply add the property names, separated by commas."
- **Changelog entry (2024):** "Sync all your users and companies from Hubspot, send new feedback, and view the delivery status of that feedback all within Hubspot."
- **Planned improvements (Productlane roadmap 2026):** "Hubspot improvements: Synching all threads and contacts with Hubspot" - suggesting the current integration has known limitations.
- **Support Portal integration:** Customers can see Linear requests from Hubspot (and Slack, Intercom, Zendesk) on the Productlane Support Portal.
- **Productlane upcoming integrations (public roadmap):** Attio CRM integration, Clarify CRM integration - expanding beyond HubSpot.

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- **For `guides/06-integration-wiring.md`** Productlane + HubSpot section.
- The "delivery status visible in HubSpot" feature directly resolves the "did customer X's request get built?" question that CSMs face daily.
- The segment sync (HubSpot properties → Productlane segments) enables RICE scoring by customer tier/MRR without manual data entry.
- The "Hubspot improvements" planned item on Productlane's roadmap signals current gaps in thread/contact sync - worth noting as a caveat.
- Productlane's CRM expansion (Attio, Clarify) signals its B2B CRM-first strategy is maturing in 2026.
- **Addresses Command Brief Q:** "Does Productlane's 2026 pricing remain competitive vs Productboard for teams primarily needing Linear integration?" - Productlane's Linear integration depth is clearly superior for Linear-native teams. HubSpot integration is functional but has planned improvements, suggesting it's not yet on par with Intercom/Linear depth. Pricing comparison requires checking live pricing pages (not available in this scrape).
